title: PhishGuard AI
summary: Archived capstone project: an AI-assisted email phishing filter that analyzes messages, extracts security evidence, scores phishing likelihood, and routes outcomes into safe, review, or quarantine paths.

logs.title: Built mailbox scanning and AI triage flow
logs.details: Implemented a live IMAP runner that tracks new mailbox messages by UID, fetches messages without marking them read, normalizes email content, extracts phishing indicators, and sends the result into the AI triage flow.

logs.title: Added structured routing and audit behavior
logs.details: Mapped AI-assisted verdicts into SAFE, REVIEW, and QUARANTINE outcomes, with review/quarantine mailbox routing, persistent review queue support, and JSONL audit records for traceability.

logs.title: Aligned GUI, schema, and documentation for capstone delivery
logs.details: Documented the project architecture, run flow, configuration, scoring behavior, review queue, and manual .eml versus live mailbox workflows so the project could stand as a complete capstone artifact.

archivedNotes: Completed as a school capstone project by Team Sentinel AI Labs.
Preserved as portfolio evidence of applied email security, AI-assisted triage, audit logging, and GUI/backend integration work.
No longer treated as an active development project.
